name: vscode-claude-context
description: Live Claude Code context window monitor with traffic-light status bar and token breakdown panel

claudeContext.hideBelow.description: Hide status bar indicator when context fill is below this percentage. 0 (default) keeps it always visible.

claudeContext.showHistoricalUsage.description: Show 5h and 7d Claude plan utilization in the status bar. When enabled, the extension sends one POST request to api.anthropic.com every 5 minutes using your stored Claude OAuth token to read rate-limit headers. This counts against your API usage.

claudeContext.showTotalFill.description: Show the raw total window fill % in parentheses in the status bar, e.g. ctx 47% (42%). The first number is usable fill (effective window minus output/reserve), the second is fill of the raw 200k model context window.

scripts.test: npm run compile && tsc --outDir out/test-dist && node src/test/run-tests.cjs
